title: Axolotl PVP Modpack
description: Modpack For Ultimate FPS and PVP
body:
# 🦎 Axolotl Client

Axolotl Client is a high-performance Minecraft modpack designed to elevate your gameplay experience. Whether you are looking for massive FPS boosts or essential quality-of-life features, Axolotl Client provides a curated selection of mods to ensure your game runs smoother than ever.

## 🚀 Features

- Optimized Performance: Experience significant FPS improvements and reduced stuttering.
- Enhanced Visuals: Built-in support for shaders and improved textures.
- PvP Ready: Includes tools and HUD enhancements specifically for competitive play.
- Lightweight: Carefully selected mods to ensure stability without bloat.

### 🐛 Bug Reports & Support

Found a bug or experiencing a crash? We’re here to help!
Join our community on Discord to report issues and get real-time assistance:
👉 Join our Support Discord

## 💡 Suggestions & Contributions

Want to see your favorite mod in the pack? While we don't take direct submissions, we are always open to community feedback. Join the Discord to suggest features or help us develop future versions of our mods and modpacks.

## 👥 Meet the Team

**Axolotl Client is a project by Halix Development.**

Owners & Maintainers: TheCoolAdor & Tyler (reallytyler)

Beta Testers: Harish & Skullbeeboi

## 🔗 Important Links
[Discord](https://discord.gg/4TRABBEsuP)
